ogTitle: Gum Creek vs Gurra Gurra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gum Creek and Gurra Gurra.
heading: Gum Creek vs Gurra Gurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gum Creek, South Australia and Gurra Gurra, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gum Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Gurra Gurra (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gum Creek or Gurra Gurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gum Creek has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Gurra Gurra scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gum Creek scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Gurra Gurra scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gum Creek or Gurra Gurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gum Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
